case_title: BILLIE JEAN TERRY VS. BRANDON CRUZ

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TERRY, BILLIE JEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, BRANDON ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ALLEANZA ASSOCIATES; $7,067.63 PRINCIPAL, $52.27 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,344.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
